channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: I reviewed a $230, $120 and $80 mechanical keyboard this week — this is the only one I’d buy - Tom's Guide
item.description:
1. I reviewed a $230, $120 and $80 mechanical keyboard this week — this is the only one I’d buy  Tom's Guide
  2. Originally $220 Keychron OnePlus 81 Pro metal keyboard hits new Amazon all-time low at $123 (Save 44%)  9to5Toys
  3. Keychron just upgraded one of my favorite mechanical keyboards — but I’m still telling everyone to buy this cheaper model instead  MSN
  4. This budget Keychron mechanical keyboard is now down to its lowest price  XDA
  5. Keychron V1 Ultra 8K review: 8,000Hz polling and 660 hours of battery make it a winner  Tom's Guide

item.title: NVIDIA says future GPUs will target 1,000,000x path tracing uplift over Pascal - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. NVIDIA says future GPUs will target 1,000,000x path tracing uplift over Pascal  VideoCardz.com
  2. DLSS 4.5 and Path Tracing Coming To 007 First Light, CONTROL Resonant, Tides of Annihilation & More. Plus, DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Gen Available March 31  NVIDIA
  3. Nvidia claims 1 million times better path tracing performance is coming in future gaming GPUs — says current GPUs are already 10,000x faster than Pascal  Tom's Hardware
  4. Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March  The Verge
  5. Path tracing perfection might be Nvidia's future but the cure for shader stutter is coming much sooner  PC Gamer

item.title: Samsung Galaxy The Z Fold 8 Camera Upgrade We’ve Been Waiting For—And It’s Not the Zoom - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Samsung Galaxy The Z Fold 8 Camera Upgrade We’ve Been Waiting For—And It’s Not the Zoom  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 leak makes surprising battery reveal  Mashable
  3. Leaked Samsung Galaxy Z Wide Fold specs show marginal upgrades over Galaxy Z Fold 7  PhoneArena
  4. Samsung’s $2,000 Gamble: Can the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Outpace Apple’s First Foldable?  Geeky Gadgets
  5. Samsung’s wide-foldable to feature 7.6-inch main display, 4800mAh battery  Gizmochina

item.title: The Unoptimized Tensor G5: The Smaller Battery In Samsung Galaxy S26 Lasts 3 Hours Longer Than The One In Pixel 10 Pro XL - Wccftech
item.description:
1. The Unoptimized Tensor G5: The Smaller Battery In Samsung Galaxy S26 Lasts 3 Hours Longer Than The One In Pixel 10 Pro XL  Wccftech
  2. I put the Samsung Galaxy S26 vs Google Pixel 10 through a 7-round face-off: Here's the winner  Tom's Guide
  3. Galaxy S26 Ultra vs. Pixel 10 Pro XL: Same phones, different year [Video]  9to5Google
  4. Galaxy S26+ is a useless phone that shouldn't have existed. What does Samsung need to change next year?  Samsung Magazine
  5. The Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10a prove 2026 will be messy for smartphone buyers  Android Police

item.title: Resident Evil Requiem Has Idle Reload Animations That Most Players Won't Ever See - TheGamer
item.description: Resident Evil Requiem Has Idle Reload Animations That Most Players Won't Ever See  TheGamer
